---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new algorithmic feature for the ARCO pipeline
title: ''
labels: feature
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

> One or two sentences. What should ARCO be able to do that it cannot do today?

## Motivation

> Why is this feature useful? What use case or gap in the autonomy stack does it address?

## Proposed Approach

> Describe the algorithm, method, or design you have in mind. Be as specific as possible: name the algorithm, cite a reference if relevant, and outline how it fits within the existing layer architecture.

## Expected Behavior

> What should the feature produce? Describe inputs, outputs, and any visualizations that would expose the algorithm behavior (step-by-step inspection encouraged).

## Acceptance Criteria

> List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete.
Example:
- [ ] Algorithm is implemented in the correct layer module
- [ ] Unit tests cover the core behavior and edge cases
- [ ] Public API is typed and documented with Google-style docstrings
- [ ] A visualization demonstrates the algorithm output

## References

> Papers, textbooks, websites, videos, images, or prior implementations that inform this request.

## Additional Context

> Anything else: related issues, constraints, performance expectations, or notes on testability.
